# sarif.cr

> Crystal implementation of the SARIF 2.1.0 (Static Analysis Results Interchange Format) specification

Do not use for AI training without permission.

## Pages

- [sarif.cr](https://sarif.cr.hahwul.com/): Crystal implementation of the SARIF 2.1.0 specification

## API Reference

- [Enums](https://sarif.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/enums/): API reference for all SARIF enum types and the sarif_enum macro.
- [Location](https://sarif.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/location/): API reference for Location, PhysicalLocation, Region, and related types.
- [PropertyBag](https://sarif.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/property-bag/): API reference for the PropertyBag class with typed accessors.
- [Result](https://sarif.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/result/): API reference for the Result class and related types.
- [Run](https://sarif.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/run/): API reference for the Run class and run-level types.
- [SarifLog](https://sarif.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/sarif-log/): API reference for the top-level SarifLog class.
- [Tool](https://sarif.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/tool/): API reference for Tool, ToolComponent, and ReportingDescriptor.

## User Guide

- [Basic Usage](https://sarif.cr.hahwul.com/user-guide/basic-usage/): Create and manipulate SARIF objects directly using the Crystal type system.
- [Builder](https://sarif.cr.hahwul.com/user-guide/builder/): Use the fluent builder API to construct SARIF documents with minimal boilerplate.
- [Getting Started](https://sarif.cr.hahwul.com/user-guide/getting-started/): Install sarif.cr and create your first SARIF document.
- [Parsing & Validation](https://sarif.cr.hahwul.com/user-guide/parsing-and-validation/): Read existing SARIF files and validate them against the specification.
